messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0000",
  "title": "2025年全球手游市场营销趋势白皮书",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1-3"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0001",
    "title": "使用广大大洞察竞争对手的广告数据",
    "page_range": "3-4",
    "summary": "本章节可回答以下维度的检索问题：\n- **主题**：竞争对手广告数据洞察、全球广告渠道覆盖分析、移动应用营销方法论。\n- **实体**：广大大（平台）、Facebook、X（原Twitter）、YouTube、TikTok、Unity、官网（www.guangdada.net）、官方微信公众号（广大大出海笔记）。\n- **日期/时间**：无具体日历日期；仅包含数据更新周期（小时级更新、每日新增）。\n- **定义**：广告素材评估的5大核心指标（投放天数、展现曝光、热度、互动、人气值）。\n- **流程/方法**：如何通过多维度（渠道、媒体、广告主）数据获取营销灵感；如何利用5大指标快速定位在投优质素材以提供实时参考；如何依托平台数据库与经验为移动营销从业者提供实操方法论。\n- **声明/主张**：广大大为全球领先的广告营销平台；已服务上千家移动应用客户；可助力打造更受玩家喜爱的应用作品。\n- **表格/图表**：以核心数据看板形式展示平台规模指标（600万APP广告主、17亿APP创意素材、120万每日新增）。\n- **指标/数据**：覆盖超70个国家/地区、80+全球广告渠道；累计17亿广告创意、600万APP广告主；每日新增120万素材；数据保持小时级更新。\n- **证据类型**：平台规模统计数据、合作渠道清单、核心功能指标说明、客户基数与服务经验声明。本部分不包含具体日期或传统表格，主要依赖平台能力说明与量化统计数据作为检索依据。"
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0002",
    "title": "Singular 是新一代的归因和市场营销分析平台",
    "page_range": "4-5",
    "summary": "This section defines Singular as a next-generation marketing attribution and analytics platform that provides actionable insights. It details the platform’s core procedure: collecting, integrating, and standardizing top-of-funnel campaign data across thousands of channels, connecting it with bottom-of-funnel attribution data to measure per-user-touchpoint ROI and enable granular optimization. Key claims and metrics include ranking #1 as the highest user-rated marketing attribution platform on G2, processing billions of app install attributions annually, and serving as the authoritative performance data source for over 1,000 fast-growing applications. Notable client entities include X (Twitter), Airbnb, Microsoft, LinkedIn, Lyft, IGG, Kakao Games, Kika, Uber, 河马游戏, Shopify, Nike, and WebToon. Reference information includes the official website (www.singular-cn.net) and official WeChat account (Singular). Evidence types cited consist of third-party review platform rankings (G2), aggregate usage statistics, and enterprise client adoption lists. No specific dates, tables, or figures are explicitly detailed in the text."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0003",
    "title": "Aarki 是一家专注于人工智能的广告科技公司",
    "page_range": "5-7",
    "summary": "**Topics:** AI-driven advertising technology, mobile ad tech platforms, real-time bidding (RTB), privacy-compliant user targeting, mobile game marketing strategies, user acquisition, ROI optimization.\n**Entities:** Aarki (AI ad tech company), Demand-Side Platform (DSP), Deep Neural Network (DNN), Real-Time Bidding (RTB), official website (www.aarki.com), WeChat official account (Aarki).\n**Dates:** 2025 (publication year of the referenced global mobile game marketing observation report).\n**Definitions/Concepts:** AI-driven DSP (platform leveraging user behavior modeling and RTB dynamics for efficient ad delivery); privacy-first user strategy (contextual signal-based targeting in ID-less environments); integrated creative services (fusion of data, creative assets, and delivery for scalable optimization).\n**Procedures/Workflows:** Aarki's three-pillar operational framework: (1) AI modeling & dynamic bidding to maximize ROI while ensuring traffic quality; (2) real-time contextual analysis (5M requests/sec) for precise audience targeting; (3) integrated creative-data-delivery pipeline to turn ad creatives into optimizable growth levers.\n**Claims:** Aarki enables sustainable mobile revenue growth for brands and app developers through measurable AI solutions; guarantees traffic quality while maximizing ROI; leverages contextual signals for precise targeting in a post-ID era; combines data, creative, and delivery as a scalable growth lever; aims to expand future mobile marketing boundaries beyond standard RTB performance.\n**Metrics:** 220 billion daily bid requests; 6.5 billion unique users covered; 10 billion globally reachable mobile devices; 5 million mobile ad requests processed per second.\n**Tables/Figures:** Table of Contents for the \"2025 Observation on Global Mobile Ga..."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0004",
    "title": "2025年全球手游市场营销趋势洞察",
    "page_range": "7",
    "summary": "This section functions solely as a title/header for the first segment of a report. It identifies the core topic (global mobile game marketing trends), the target year (2025), and the primary entity (mobile games). It contains no definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. It can answer retrieval questions regarding the section title, the report's focus year, and its industry/geographic scope. All other requested content types are absent from this section."
  }
]

message.content:
This parent section introduces the "2025 Global Mobile Game Marketing Trends Whitepaper" and outlines foundational platforms and methodologies for mobile game marketing, focusing on three core ad tech and analytics solutions: Guangdada, Singular, and Aarki.
**Topics:** Competitor ad data insights, global ad channel coverage, mobile app marketing methodology, marketing attribution & analytics, AI-driven advertising technology, real-time bidding (RTB), privacy-compliant user targeting, user acquisition, and ROI optimization.
**Entities:** Guangdada, Singular, Aarki, Facebook, X (Twitter), YouTube, TikTok, Unity, G2, Airbnb, Microsoft, LinkedIn, Lyft, IGG, Kakao Games, Kika, Uber, Hema Games, Shopify, Nike, WebToon, plus official websites and WeChat accounts for each platform.
**Dates:** 2025 (report publication year); data refresh cycles operate on hourly and daily intervals.
**Definitions:** Five core ad creative evaluation metrics (days running, impressions, heat, interaction, popularity); AI-driven DSP; privacy-first user strategy (contextual signal-based targeting in ID-less environments); integrated creative services.
**Procedures/Workflows:** Multi-dimensional data acquisition for marketing inspiration; leveraging core metrics to identify high-performing creatives; Singular’s pipeline of collecting, integrating, and standardizing top-funnel campaign data with bottom-funnel attribution to measure per-user-touchpoint ROI; Aarki’s three-pillar operational framework (AI modeling & dynamic bidding, real-time contextual analysis, and integrated creative-data-delivery pipeline).
**Claims:** Guangdada is a leading global ad marketing platform serving 1,000+ clients; Singular ranks #1 on G2 for user-rated marketing attribution and serves as an authoritative performance data source for 1,000+ fast-growing apps; Aarki enables sustainable mobile revenue growth through measurable AI solutions, guarantees traffic quality, and expands marketing boundaries beyond standard RTB.
**Metrics:** Guangdada covers 70+ countries, 80+ channels, 6M advertisers, 1.7B creatives, and 1.2M daily new creatives; Singular processes billions of annual app install attributions; Aarki handles 220B daily bid requests, covers 6.5B unique users, reaches 10B mobile devices, and processes 5M ad requests per second.
**Tables/Figures:** Dashboard-style displays of platform scale metrics (Guangdada); Table of Contents for the "2025 Observation on Global Mobile Game Marketing" report. No traditional figures are explicitly detailed.
**Evidence Types:** Platform scale statistics, third-party review rankings (G2), aggregate usage/processing statistics, enterprise client adoption lists, channel coverage inventories, and platform capability declarations.

response_text:
This parent section introduces the "2025 Global Mobile Game Marketing Trends Whitepaper" and outlines foundational platforms and methodologies for mobile game marketing, focusing on three core ad tech and analytics solutions: Guangdada, Singular, and Aarki.
**Topics:** Competitor ad data insights, global ad channel coverage, mobile app marketing methodology, marketing attribution & analytics, AI-driven advertising technology, real-time bidding (RTB), privacy-compliant user targeting, user acquisition, and ROI optimization.
**Entities:** Guangdada, Singular, Aarki, Facebook, X (Twitter), YouTube, TikTok, Unity, G2, Airbnb, Microsoft, LinkedIn, Lyft, IGG, Kakao Games, Kika, Uber, Hema Games, Shopify, Nike, WebToon, plus official websites and WeChat accounts for each platform.
**Dates:** 2025 (report publication year); data refresh cycles operate on hourly and daily intervals.
**Definitions:** Five core ad creative evaluation metrics (days running, impressions, heat, interaction, popularity); AI-driven DSP; privacy-first user strategy (contextual signal-based targeting in ID-less environments); integrated creative services.
**Procedures/Workflows:** Multi-dimensional data acquisition for marketing inspiration; leveraging core metrics to identify high-performing creatives; Singular’s pipeline of collecting, integrating, and standardizing top-funnel campaign data with bottom-funnel attribution to measure per-user-touchpoint ROI; Aarki’s three-pillar operational framework (AI modeling & dynamic bidding, real-time contextual analysis, and integrated creative-data-delivery pipeline).
**Claims:** Guangdada is a leading global ad marketing platform serving 1,000+ clients; Singular ranks #1 on G2 for user-rated marketing attribution and serves as an authoritative performance data source for 1,000+ fast-growing apps; Aarki enables sustainable mobile revenue growth through measurable AI solutions, guarantees traffic quality, and expands marketing boundaries beyond standard RTB.
**Metrics:** Guangdada covers 70+ countries, 80+ channels, 6M advertisers, 1.7B creatives, and 1.2M daily new creatives; Singular processes billions of annual app install attributions; Aarki handles 220B daily bid requests, covers 6.5B unique users, reaches 10B mobile devices, and processes 5M ad requests per second.
**Tables/Figures:** Dashboard-style displays of platform scale metrics (Guangdada); Table of Contents for the "2025 Observation on Global Mobile Game Marketing" report. No traditional figures are explicitly detailed.
**Evidence Types:** Platform scale statistics, third-party review rankings (G2), aggregate usage/processing statistics, enterprise client adoption lists, channel coverage inventories, and platform capability declarations.
